subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! He Who doeth whatsoever He willeth hath come, and He Who ordaineth whatsoever He pleaseth hath raised high the banner of His Revelation - He, the Manifestation Whose people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین یفعل ما یشاء آمد و یحکم ما یرید علم ظهور برافراخت اوست ظهوریکه اهل
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
